feedback.error: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.
feedback.footer_note: Your conversation will be included with your feedback to help improve Argus.

chat.welcome: Welcome to Argus. Tell me an investing idea in plain language and I will help test it with Alpha-safe assumptions.
chat.trigger_create_strategy: I want to create a new strategy.
chat.trigger_create_collection: I want to create a new collection.
placeholder_prompts: What if I bought Tesla on significant dips?
How would a simple DCA strategy perform on Bitcoin?
Show me how an RSI crossover works on Apple.
What happens if I hold Nvidia during high volatility?
Compare holding ETH vs BTC over the last year.
Test a moving average breakout strategy on SPY.
How does momentum trading work for tech stocks?
What if I invested in dividend stocks during a recession?
Simulate a trend following strategy on Solana.
Can you explain how mean reversion works?

tsla.label: Test Tesla dips
tsla.value: What if I bought Tesla on significant dips?

btc.label: Try Bitcoin momentum
btc.value: Test a momentum breakout idea on Bitcoin

dca.label: Explore DCA
dca.value: Show me a DCA accumulation strategy for Apple

example_queries.q1: What if I bought Apple on significant dips?
example_queries.q2: Test a momentum breakout strategy on Bitcoin.
example_queries.q3: How would a simple DCA strategy perform on Tesla?

chat.rate_limit_error: You've reached your request limit. Please wait a moment and try again.
chat.error_offline: Argus could not reach the API yet. Start the FastAPI service, then send your idea again.
chat.error_load: Could not load that conversation. Try again.
chat.error_backtest: I could not complete that simulation. Check that the API is running and try again.
chat.new_chat_ready: New chat ready. What idea should we test?
chat.resume_prompt: Resuming "{{title}}". What would you like to explore next?
chat.empty_history: Your past chats will appear here.
chat.no_recent_activity: No recent activity yet. Your strategies and chats will appear here.

strategies.empty_state: Strategies you save from chat will appear here.
strategies.error_load: Could not load strategies. Make sure the API is running.
strategies.unexecuted_hint: Run this strategy to see performance
strategies.run_hint: Run this strategy to see how {{symbols}} would have performed.

suggestions.title: RSI Mean Reversion
suggestions.desc: Buy oversold dips and sell overbought peaks.
suggestions.prompt: Design a strategy that buys the dip whenever the RSI falls below 30 and sells when it hits 70 for BTC.

suggestions.title: 10% Stop-Loss
suggestions.desc: Protect your capital with an automated exit rule.
suggestions.prompt: I want a strategy that buys any stock in my list and automatically sells if the price drops 10% from my entry.

suggestions.title: Trend Follower
suggestions.desc: Ride the momentum while the price is above the 50-day MA.
suggestions.prompt: Create a strategy that buys whenever the price is above the 50-day moving average on QQQ.

suggestions.title: Monthly DCA
suggestions.desc: Build positions steadily with fixed recurring buys.
suggestions.prompt: Create a simple monthly DCA strategy that buys SPY on the first trading day of each month.

collections.empty_state: Add strategy to collection or save from chat to see them here.
collections.error_load: Could not load collections. Make sure the API is running.

suggestions.title: Tech Giants
suggestions.desc: Group FAANG or top semiconductor companies in one place.
suggestions.prompt: I want to create a collection of the top 5 tech giants like AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA.

suggestions.title: Energy Transition
suggestions.desc: Climate-focused ideas and clean energy plays.
suggestions.prompt: I want to start a collection for energy transition and solar power ideas.

suggestions.title: Dividend Kings
suggestions.desc: Safe, consistent yield plays for a defensive portfolio.
suggestions.prompt: How should I structure a collection for long-term dividend growth stocks?

suggestions.title: Crypto HODL
suggestions.desc: Store your Bitcoin and Ethereum dip-buying logic.
suggestions.prompt: Create a collection for my long-term crypto accumulation strategies.

subscription.upgrade_pro: Try upgrading to Pro for Free

onboarding.prompt: What is your current primary goal? Don't worry, you can change it later.

language.title: Choose your language

onboarding.goal_description: We'll tailor your strategy insights based on this.

learn_basics.title: Learn investing basics
learn_basics.description: Start with simple ideas and clear explanations.

test_stock_idea.title: Test a stock idea
test_stock_idea.description: Validate a thesis on symbols you follow.

error.title: API Unreachable
error.description: We couldn't connect to the Argus engine. Please ensure the backend service is running and try again.
